alternative_parents.description: Organic 1,3-dipolar compounds with the general structure  X#N+-Z- <-> X-=N+=Z <-> X-=N-Z+ <-> X-N=Z (X = C or O, Z = C, N, or O).
alternative_parents.name: Propargyl-type 1,3-dipolar organic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a dialkylamine group, characterized by two alkyl groups bonded to the amino nitrogen.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylamines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbon-sulfur bond.
alternative_parents.name: Organosulfur compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
alternative_parents.name: Organic salts

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.
alternative_parents.name: Organic cations

class.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
class.name: Organonitrogen compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as shiff bases. These are aldimines where the nitrogen atom of the aldimine group is linked to an alkyl or aryl group.

direct_parent.description: Aldimines where the nitrogen atom of the aldimine group is linked to an alkyl or aryl group.
direct_parent.name: Shiff bases

intermediate_nodes.description: Organic compounds containing the aldimine functional group.
intermediate_nodes.name: Aldimines

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds containing an imine functional group, with the general structure RN=CR2 (R = H, hydrocarbyl).
subclass.name: Imines

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
superclass.name: Organic nitrogen compounds
